net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.impl

Class LuggagePropertiesImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.impl.BasicNotifierImpl
      • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.BasicEObjectImpl
        • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl
          • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl.Container
            • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.impl.LuggagePropertiesImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    LuggageProperties, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EStructuralFeature.Internal.DynamicValueHolder, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.InternalEObject

    public class LuggagePropertiesImpl
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl.Container
implements LuggageProperties
    An implementation of the model object 'Luggage Properties'.

    The following features are implemented:

    • Luggage Stow Distance From Seat Mean
    • Luggage Stow Distance From Seat Deviation
    • Percentage Of Passengers With No Luggage
    • Percentage Of Passengers With Small Luggage
    • Percentage Of Passengers With Medium Luggage
    • Percentage Of Passengers With Big Luggage
    • Passenger Small Luggage Stow Time Mean
    • Passenger Small Luggage Stow Time Deviation
    • Passenger Medium Luggage Stow Time Mean
    • Passenger Medium Luggage Stow Time Deviation
    • Passenger Big Luggage Stow Time Mean
    • Passenger Big Luggage Stow Time Deviation
